pillars.title: Our Mission
pillars.text: To provide world-class fitness facilities and expert guidance accessible to everyone, helping our members discover their true potential.

pillars.title: Our Community
pillars.text: We believe fitness is stronger together. Our diverse community of members supports and inspires each other every single day.

pillars.title: Our History
pillars.text: Established in 2018, we've grown from a small neighborhood gym to Kathmandu's premier fitness destination, serving over 5,000 members.

whyChooseUs.title: Expert Trainers
whyChooseUs.text: Certified professionals to guide your journey.

whyChooseUs.title: Flexible Hours
whyChooseUs.text: Open early and late to fit your schedule.
